# metabase_collection_permission (Resource)

Permission of one permission group on one collection (an edge of the Metabase collection graph). Removing the resource revokes access (sets it to "none").

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Give the "Analysts" group write access to a collection.
resource "metabase_collection_permission" "analysts_reports" {
  group_id      = metabase_permission_group.analysts.id
  collection_id = metabase_collection.reports.id
  permission    = "write"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `collection_id` (String) ID of the collection
- `group_id` (String) ID of the permission group
- `permission` (String) Access level: "read" or "write" (to revoke, delete the resource; there is no "none" value).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite id "<group_id>:<collection_id>"
